summary: LifeScript 2.0 — both backend and frontend tested. 100% backend pass (23/23 pytests, including all 8 new v2 endpoints: hidden-pattern, identity-card, weekly-insight, reflection-question, daily-challenge, side-quests, stealth-mission, chapter-message). Frontend: splash bug from iteration_1 is FIXED (button now at y=465 within 667px viewport). All v2 screens reachable; AI integrations on /identity, /insight, /coach (Hard mode), /chapter, mission→reflection-question all return personalised AI output. Constellation has all 8 nodes (Career/Finances/Health/Relationships/Mind/Skills/Purpose/Legacy). Coach 5 mode pills are present and switchable. Onboarding routes to onboarding screen and the 5 new question testIDs (proud/someday/rolemodel/tuesday/change) are verified in source at steps 10–14.

issues: RN-Web deprecation warnings persist: 'shadow* style props are deprecated. Use boxShadow' and 'props.pointerEvents is deprecated. Use style.pointerEvents'. Same as iteration_1 — not blocking but noisy in console.

action_items: Optional cleanup: migrate remaining shadow* and pointerEvents usages to boxShadow / style.pointerEvents (RN-Web 0.76+).

Spec-vs-implementation testID mismatches to align (no functional impact, just docs/test-script drift): /focus uses 'focus-toggle-btn' & 'focus-reset-btn' (spec said 'focus-play-btn'); /upgrade uses 'plan-monthly'/'plan-yearly'/'upgrade-purchase-btn' (spec said 'upgrade-monthly'/'upgrade-yearly'/'upgrade-activate-btn'); /boss uses 'boss-start-btn' (spec said 'boss-summon-btn'). /archive, /timeline, /inventory, /halloffame, /focus, /area do NOT have a screen-level wrapper testID — only back-btn / per-item testIDs. Either add wrappers (e.g. testID='archive-screen') for easier E2E, or update the spec.
critical_code_review_comments: backend/server.py: clean stateless Claude proxy — _ask_for_json with markdown-fence stripping + retry is solid; HTTPException propagation + Pydantic shape validation is correct. Daily-challenge cache (_DAILY_CHALLENGE_SEED) is in-process — restarts wipe it. Acceptable for current scope but consider Redis or Mongo persistence for true determinism across pod restarts.
backend/server.py: coach_chat replays only user history into LlmChat (assistant turns implicit) — works because LlmChat keeps server-side context per session_id. Good.
backend/server.py is now 600 lines (single file) — close to the 700-line guideline. Splitting models.py, prompts.py, routers/*.py would help maintainability before next feature wave.
frontend/src/state.ts: AsyncStorage key is namespaced '@lifescript_state_v2' — clean migration from v1.

Onboarding step gating: confirmed in source that the next-button is conditionally enabled per step; my Playwright sweep terminated early because I read testIDs BEFORE filling inputs, not a code defect.
updated_files: /app/backend/tests/test_lifescript_v2_ai.py (new — 12 tests for the 8 new v2 endpoints incl. parametrized chapter 1..4 and daily-challenge determinism)

success_rate.backend: 100% (23/23) — incl. 12/12 new v2 endpoint tests on first run, no Budget-exceeded flakes this iteration
success_rate.frontend: ~95% — splash fixed, home/coach/identity/insight/chapter/mission/reflection AI all wired correctly, all v2 screens reachable; only spec/testID-name drift noted (non-blocking)

seed_data_creation: Seeded localStorage key '@lifescript_state_v2' with an onboarded Aria profile (xp=120, streak=2, 1 open Career mission, currentChapter=1, isPro=false, all 8-area state present) to bypass the 15-question onboarding for screen-level UI tests.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Backend pytests at /app/backend/tests/test_lifescript_api.py (v1 endpoints: 11 tests) and /app/backend/tests/test_lifescript_v2_ai.py (v2 endpoints: 12 tests) — both fully passing. Run with: pytest /app/backend/tests/ -v --junitxml=/app/test_reports/pytest/pytest_results.xml. Total wall-time ~100s (claude AI calls are the bottleneck). EXPO_PUBLIC_BACKEND_URL is read from /app/frontend/.env in conftest. For frontend E2E, seed @lifescript_state_v2 (schema in iteration_2.json action items above) to skip onboarding. Important testID corrections vs. review-request spec: focus-toggle-btn (not focus-play-btn), plan-monthly/plan-yearly/upgrade-purchase-btn (not upgrade-monthly/upgrade-yearly/upgrade-activate-btn), boss-start-btn (not boss-summon-btn). No wrapper screen testIDs on archive/timeline/inventory/halloffame/focus/area — assert via *-back-btn or per-item testIDs.
rca_of_issue: No new bugs found this iteration. Iteration_1's splash button-below-fold is resolved — bbox now y=465 with height=57 (522 < 667) so 'Begin your journey' is fully tappable on 375x667 mobile viewport without scrolling. Iteration_1's intermittent 'Budget has been exceeded' did not reproduce on either v1 or v2 endpoint suite this run.
